summary: Static packet for federal taxation prompts. It supports role tests around official-source traceability, fiscal tradeoffs, and lawful advocacy.

sources.title: Internal Revenue Service official tax information
claims: Tax filing rules, credits, deductions, forms, and deadlines should be verified through IRS or other official tax authority pages.
Tax consequences vary by income, filing status, jurisdiction, timing, and facts.

sources.title: Tax-policy issue frames
claims: Higher-tax frames often emphasize revenue, progressivity, public investment, deficit reduction, and distributional fairness.
Lower-tax frames often emphasize growth, simplicity, incentives, household budgets, and limits on government.
